overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban plaza at dusk. The weather transitions from clear to heavy fog as the character moves through the commercial district, ascends outdoor stairs, and enters a covered upper plaza with neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with large billboard

events.description: two pedestrians run across the plaza from right to left in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open plaza toward the commercial district

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians running across the plaza path from right to left

entered.detail: illuminated billboard featuring a cartoon character in red outfit holding a drink
tall futuristic building with illuminated windows and glass facade
tall palm trees lining the left side of the plaza
multiple glowing digital screens visible in the distance down the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide commercial plaza at dusk with clear skies. A large illuminated cartoon billboard dominates the left side while a modern glass building rises on the right. Two pedestrians run across the path as the camera walks forward through the open space.

events.description: heavy fog begins to roll in rapidly reducing visibility across the plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza as fog begins to obscure the distant view

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up to an upper plaza level
commercial entrance with glowing cyan and orange signage

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the commercial district, the camera approaches a wide outdoor staircase. The weather begins to change as heavy fog rolls in, reducing visibility. The large billboard falls behind while neon storefronts become visible on the right.

events.description: beginning to ascend the wide outdoor staircase toward the upper level
moving under building overhang causing significant darkening of the scene

agents.ego_description: climbing the outdoor staircase as fog intensifies and wind causes palm trees to sway

entered.detail: concrete overhang extending from the building creating partial cover
opening to the covered upper plaza level with visible neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the outdoor staircase as a heavy fog storm sets in, obscuring the sky and reducing visibility dramatically. Moving under a building overhang, the lighting darkens significantly while the upper plaza entrance becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered upper plaza with neon ceiling lights

events.description: entering the covered upper plaza area with overhead neon lighting
cyan neon ceiling lights become prominent through the fog

agents.ego_description: walking through the fog-covered upper plaza beneath glowing neon ceiling strips

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking through the foggy plaza ahead of the camera

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure with embedded cyan neon light strips
large vertical digital billboard displaying animated advertisements
futuristic curved benches with purple lighting

segments.scene_description: Entering the covered upper plaza, the scene is dominated by cyan neon ceiling lights glowing through the heavy fog. The camera moves past futuristic seating areas toward a large neon billboard while the glass building now appears on the left receding into the fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide commercial plaza at dusk that gradually transforms into a fog-shrouded, neon-lit upper terrace. It begins in an open space under clear skies, passing a large illuminated cartoon billboard and a modern glass building as pedestrians cross the path. As the camera moves deeper into the district, heavy fog begins to roll in and obscure the horizon, shifting the focus toward glowing neon storefronts. The scene then transitions as the camera ascends an outdoor staircase into a dense fog storm, moving under a dark building overhang that dramatically reduces visibility. Finally, the camera enters a covered upper plaza where cyan neon ceiling lights pierce through the thick mist, gliding past futuristic seating areas toward a large billboard while the glass building recedes into the haze.
